name: Adventure
description: Adventure for the Atari 2600 is an early graphical adventure game.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Dragon Slay Check
options.description: If true, slaying each dragon for the first time is a check

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Bat Logic
options.description: How the bat is considered for logic With cannot_break, the bat cannot pick up an item that starts out-of-logic until the player touches it With can_break, the bat is free to pick up any items, even if they are out-of-logic With use_logic, the bat can pick up anything just like can_break, and locations are no longer considered to require the magnet or bridge to collect, since the bat can retrieve these.

options.label: Freeincarnate Max
options.description: How many maximum freeincarnate items to allow When done generating items, any remaining item slots will be filled with freeincarnates, up to this maximum amount.

options.label: Dragon Rando Type
options.description: How to randomize the dragon starting locations normal: Grundle is in the overworld, Yorgle in the white castle, and Rhindle in the black castle shuffle: A random dragon is placed in the overworld, one in the white castle, and one in the black castle overworldplus: Dragons can be placed anywhere, but at least one will be in the overworld randomized: Dragons can be anywhere except the credits room Supported values: normal, shuffle, overworldplus, randomized Default value: shuffle

options.label: Connector Multi Slot
options.description: If true, the client and lua connector will add lowest 8 bits of the player slot to the port number used to connect to each other, to simplify connecting multiple local clients to local EmuHawk instances.

options.label: Yorgle Min Speed
options.description: Sets Yorgle's speed when all speed reducers are found.

options.label: Grundle Min Speed
options.description: Sets Grundle's speed when all speed reducers are found.

options.label: Rhindle Min Speed
options.description: Sets Rhindle's speed when all speed reducers are found.

options.label: Difficulty Switch A
options.description: Set availability of left difficulty switch This controls the speed of the dragons' bite animation

options.label: Difficulty Switch B
options.description: Set availability of right difficulty switch On hard, dragons will run away from the sword

options.label: Start Castle
options.description: Choose or randomize which castle to start in front of.
